items.title: When will LeBron James announce his decision? 'We're not going to be rushed,' agent Rich Paul said
items.summary: If it feels like the LeBron James free agency saga has dragged on and on, it's because it has. Free agency officially opened more than three weeks ago (June 30), and you can be sure LeBron's agent, Rich Paul, had conversations with other teams before that (the NBA is a tampering league).So when will his decision come? Paul would not give a timeline, speaking on the latest edition of his “Game Over” podcast with Max Kellerman (released Monday night)."We're not going to be rushed. We're not going to be rushed. It's his choice to make, and when he makes the choice, he'll make it..."I don't know when his choice is going to be made, but it could be 48 seconds. It could be 48 minutes. I don't know. Again, you can't make somebody know something that they don't know."Paul also pushed back on the idea that LeBron was in no hurry because he…

items.title: Jalen Brunson says Knicks have not talked about whether team will attend White House after championship
items.summary: New York Knicks owner James Dolan gladly accepted an offer to go to the White House to celebrate his team's championship, but it's unclear who he'll have with him. Star guard Jalen Brunson said Monday that the team has yet to discuss the issue, telling Variety, "We'll cross our bridge when we get to it."NBA teams have — famously, in some cases — not celebrated their championships at the White House with President Donald Trump in office. The Golden State Warriors started that trend in 2017, when Stephen Curry and Trump got into a feud, resulting in Trump revoking the team's invite. Since then, no NBA team has celebrated their championship at the White House with Trump. During Joe Biden's tenure as president, three NBA teams attended the White House for a championship celebration.Brunson didn't rule out the idea to Variety, simply saying the Knicks…

items.title: Jalen Wilson to Hawks, Ziaire Williams with Lakers as Tyson Etienne, Trevon Scott go overseas
items.summary: Over the past few days, several players from the Brooklyn Nets’ 2025-26 squad have found new homes, specifically forwards Jalen Wilson, Ziaire Williams, two-way guard Tyson Etienne, and Trevon Scott, a forward who had two 10-day contracts with the team to close out the year.It is of course not unusual for a team in the rebuild phase following a season where the team won 20 games and had an overhaul that included three new draft picks, a big trade and a couple of free agent signings.According to HoopsHype’s Michael Scotto, Wilson is the latest. He is signing a two-way contract with the Atlanta Hawks for the 2026-27 season after his team option was declined by Brooklyn earlier this offseason.The Atlanta Hawks and Jalen Wilson have agreed to a two-way deal, league sources told @hoopshype. Wilson averaged 7.4 points per game in three seasons with the Brooklyn Nets.…

While that raised a few eyebrows, it’s nothing new. We have been told enough over the last three weeks that a LeBron James free agency decision was imminent from someone supposedly in the know, only for it not to come through. Bottom line, we all still don’t know.On The Ringer’s “Game Over with Max Kellerman and Rich Paul”…

items.title: Rich Paul says LeBron James has no timetable to make free-agent decision: 'We're not going to be rushed'
items.summary: LeBron James' decision may not be as imminent as some believed. James' agent, Rich Paul, said Monday that the former Los Angeles Lakers star won't be "rushed" into picking his next team.Paul made those comments during an appearance on the "Game Over" podcast with Max Kellerman. In addition to saying James will take his time with his decision, Paul added that teams do not need to reach out to try and convince James to sign with them at this point in the process, per ESPN."There's been several people to call and say, 'Hey, Rich, is there anything more we should be doing? We could be doing?' And my answer is, 'No. We don't need you to go above and beyond about anything. We understand it. It's clear. All the messages have been sent.'"That seems to imply James has all the relevant information he needs to make his choice.…

items.title: Can the Suns tap into Miles Bridges’ two-way potential?
items.summary: On July 13, the Miles Bridges trade became official. Brian Gregory had this to say about the Suns’ new power forward.“His elite athleticism, strength and versatility allow him to impact the game on both ends of the floor. He embodies the grit, competitiveness and work ethic that fit our identity, and we’re excited to welcome him to Phoenix.”High praise. Or maybe bold praise, considering Bridges’ six-year NBA career with the Hornets.Coming out of Michigan-lite, Bridges was projected to be the type of player that Gregory is describing. A potential two-way star, with the athleticism to be a menace on the defensive end and a problem with the ball in his hands.Tom Izzo had this to say to the New York Post about Miles Bridges in advance of the 2018 draft.“I see a guy who can play a lot of positions and defend them with his strength and rebounding,’’ Izzo said. “What I’d like to see him get…

items.title: Tuesday Posted & Toasted Notes: Human Towns and pregame meals
items.summary: A Brahminy kite eagle is pictured at KL Bird Park in Kuala Lumpur on December 27, 2023. (Photo by Mohd RASFAN / AFP) (Photo by MOHD RASFAN/AFP via Getty Images) | AFP via Getty Images Don’t start reading this with high hopes. It’s July 21, so as much as I try, it’s not that I can gather a lot of links and put together tons of notes. Bad times ahead for a workaholic like myself.Karl-Anthony Towns opened up about the emotional aftermath of winning the NBA championship during his appearance on Jay Shetty’s “On Purpose” podcast, how the achievement passed far quicker than he ever imagined, and admitted he struggled with suddenly having no basketball left to play after the Finals.Kris Pursiainen of Daily Knicks only sees one LeBron James destination that could help the Knicks, or at least not hurt them too much.Speaking of James, no decision arrived on Monday, only to shut Pat Bev’s…

items.title: LeBron James Decision 4.0 live updates: Latest rumors and team buzz
items.summary: The NBA is still waiting on LeBron James as of July 21. He's the last big domino of free agency in 2026, with league commissioner Adam Silver noting recently even the league's schedule makers need James to make a decision on his next team. James could make his pick any moment at this point, even today, and rumors of what he might do persist in the absence of clarity.The teams James is seriously considering are well-known at this point. The Cleveland Cavaliers, Miami Heat, Philadelphia 76ers and Golden State Warriors have been tabbed as favorites in multiple reports, and the Denver Nuggets and Minnesota Timberwolves have also mentioned as possibilities.James and his camp have all the information they need, according to USA TODAY Sports' Lorenzo Reyes. Now, he's just weighing out all of his options. There's nonetheless rampant speculation on when he'll be done with that process, and what…
